strengths: 15+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding and sustaining an open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research at scale
Title is Senior/Staff — no Principal/Director-level IC leadership evidence
No Master's/PhD in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products
Director-level IC / strategic leadership track record
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks

response.justification: The role requires a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, and cloud strategy fluency. The résumé shows 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering and recent contributions to MCP/agent tooling at re:cinq, but lacks evidence of AI products at scale, no advanced AI degree, no Principal/Director-level title, and limited cloud-platform strategy or advisory work with strategic customers. Strong craftsman profile, but a mismatch against the seniority and AI-leadership bar.
